text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a field of computer science that aims to create machines capable of thinking and learning like humans. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance on tasks by analyzing data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information in ways similar to the human brain. Today, AI powers many everyday tools, such as voice assistants, recommendation systems on streaming services, and navigation apps that suggest the fastest routes. From smart home devices to online shopping, AI is quietly transforming how we live and work.
